user.title: Sign in to Divoom
user.description: One-time sign-in to fetch the LocalToken for each of your devices. Only the resulting UserId, cloud Token, and per-device LocalToken are stored — not your password. After setup, all commands stay on your LAN.

pick_device.title: Pick a device
pick_device.description: Each device becomes its own entry. Add the flow again for the second one.

reauth_confirm.title: Sign in again
reauth_confirm.description: The stored LocalToken was rejected — the device was probably re-paired. Re-enter your Divoom credentials and I'll refresh the token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Divoom cloud.
error.no_devices_found: No Divoom devices found on this account.
error.unknown_device: That device is no longer on the account.
